MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Samsung Wallet/Pay <pay.noreply@wallet-email.samsung.com>
Date: Wed, 10 Sep 2025 10:50:35 +0000
Subject: Welcome to Samsung Wallet
Message-ID: <01000199333fad47-bf00b13f-16ad-4a6f-a3f8-a2e75dc626db-000000@email.amazonses.com>
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="----=_Part_6228780_850369408.1757501435057"

<html><head><title>Samsung Wallet</title>   </head>   <body style="padding:0; margin:0;">   <div style="margin:16px;color:#666">    <div style="border-bottom:3px solid #1428A0;padding:10px 0 16px;">        <a href="#"><img src="https://smps-resource.s3.amazonaws.com/pay/sys/prd/logo_samsungwallet.png" style="width:300px" alt="SAMSUNG Wallet" align="absmiddle" border="0" /></a>      </div>        <div class="" style="padding:16px 0 10px;">        <div style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" /></div><div style="text-align: center;"> </div><div style="text-align: center;"> </div><div style="text-align: center;"><p>Dear Emil Skogsund,</p><p>Thank you for registering for Samsung Wallet - the simple, safe and secure way to make contactless payments from your eligible Samsung device (smartphone or watch).</p><p>Your security is important to us: Samsung Wallet uses tokenization and two-factor authentication to actively protect your payment information. Also, your fingerprint or a four-digit PIN is required to make payments.</p><p>Registering your card and making your first mobile payment has never been easier. Valid on Mastercard and Visa branded debit and credit cards only.</p><p> </p><p><br />For more information visit: <a href="https://www.samsung.com/se/wallet/">Link</a></p><p> </p><p>Warm regards,<br />The Samsung Wallet Team</p><p> </p><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" /></div>       </div>       <div class="footer" style="display:block;text-align:center;color:#a8a8a8;padding:8px 16px 10px;border-top:3px solid #1428A0;background:#fafafa;">        <p style="font:11px 'Arial', 'Malgun Gothic';">This email is being sent to notify you of important changes to your Samsung Wallet app. Please do not reply to this email.</p>       </div>  </div>   </body>   </html>
